metadata.thoughts:
**Deciding strike dates**

I need to set the startDate and endDate for the strike planned for 24 hours starting January 19, 2026. Should I set startDate to "2026-01-19 00:00:00" and endDate to "2026-01-19 23:59:59"? Typically, a 24-hour strike runs from midnight to the end of the day. The document specifies "di 24 ore," confirming the approach. The affected staff are only operating personnel, not a general national strike. I'll make sure to maintain consistency with the timing!
